turns.text: Thanks for calling Ridgeline HVAC! This is Sky, our AI assistant. How can I help you today?
Hi, I'd like to schedule a furnace tune-up for Thursday.
Thanks for calling Ridgeline HVAC! This is Sky, our AI assistant. How can I help you today?
Uh, I just said it. A furnace tune-up on Thursday?
We offer furnace tune-ups, duct cleaning, and emergency repair. Would you like to hear about our service areas?
Sorry, I didn't catch that. Could you repeat your request?
Can I just talk to a real person?
Our office hours are Monday through Friday, eight to five.
Forget it. Is there any way to book online?
